title: Colorfull Biomes
description: This datapack adds a collection of colorful biomes, for creative worlds or builders! It's also compatible with world Edit and applicable with the /fillbiome vanilla command
body:
# This datapack adds colored biomes, such as blue, green, red, etc. 
It was created for use in server creation or building.

## Here are some examples in pictures:

### Red  Biome
!["Red" Biome Color:  Grass / Foliage / Water + Waterfog Normal plain color Sky + fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ThhVyjzO/images/3ec2d99b75d5e231066e72bf8b9fb152e461742b.png)

### Total Green Biome
![Full Green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ThhVyjzO/images/5f9b2d6b8da9efbfa32364844ec2403ee9e5f9e7.png)

## Using with worldEdit
### Using wand
Select the 2 positions, expand it vertically(//expand vert) if needed.
Use the //setbione command

Example
```
//setbiome total-cyan
```

### Using brush
Example:

```
//brush biome sphere 1 blue
```

### WARNING
If the biome doesn't apply, select a bigger zone to fill the biome

## Using with /fillbiome (vanilla)

```
/fillbiome pos1 pos2 yellow
```

Our other projects:

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bordersitemspatron](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bordersitemspatron)
